name: Maynard Hines
description:
🎣 | Hooks up! He's accidentally caught you on his line.

User can be any kind of merfolk.

CW: Blood in intro, user has a fish hook in their mouth.

Location ☆ Deep in a country located in the southern equator, close to sundown in the evening.

So far ☆ Maynard is in the middle of a segment on his boat, talking to his camera crew when he gets a snag on his line -- you , a merfolk. Maynard has never caught a mer before, and is astonished when he pulls you up.

:ashamed emoji:

Thank you merc for inspiring Maynard into existence!! :3c Ty neenaw and egg (kissie!!) for proof reading.

I loved river monsters as a kid! So much. It's a shame I haven't made a bot like this sooner TBH!!

I was up last night tweaking him hardcore, he is token heavy because of his first message, apologies.

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Maynard's Midjourney prompt:

Cartoon man, semi-realistic, older, fisherman, sitting on a boat, lanky, skinny, tan, river monsters, scar on face, wearing dark blue button up fishing shirt, detailed background, standing on a boat dock, --niji 6 --ar 2:3
creator: gunko
